acceptance: Options for removed native backends and pruned features are deleted or fail clearly if a deliberate one-release message is chosen.
verification: Removed follow-torrent, http-auth-challenge, ftp-reuse-connection, ssh-host-key-md, rpc-user, rpc-passwd, rpc-secure, rpc-certificate, and rpc-private-key from option registration, usage text, manual, and completion. `build/default/aria2-next --help=#all` stale-option scan passed.
notes: Default is removal, not compatibility aliasing.

acceptance: Documentation describes the modern supported surface and no longer claims removed backend support.
verification: README, overview, manual, and AGENTS.md now describe the modern executable, JSON-RPC, C++17, libcurl, Boost, OpenSSL, libtorrent, and native ED2K surfaces. Removed stale native backend and public library claims.
notes: Keep release artifact names aligned with AGENTS rules.

scope: Shell completion and public API surface
acceptance: Completion and API docs match actual supported options and protocol behavior.
verification: Completion no longer lists removed options. Public libaria2 manual, examples, header, pkg-config template, source, test inventory, and install rules were removed. Internal CLI/RPC types now live in `src/InternalTypes.h`.
notes: The maintained public control API is JSON-RPC.

acceptance: The public C++ embedding library is retained only if current consumers require it, otherwise removed with docs and build cleanup.
verification: Motrix Next uses aria2-next as a sidecar engine, so the optional public C++ library was removed. `ARIA2_ENABLE_LIBARIA2`, public install rules, `libaria2.pc`, API sources, API tests, and examples were deleted.
notes: No hidden public library compatibility target remains.

acceptance: Help output, completion, manual, README, and source scans agree on removed and retained capabilities.
verification: `cmake --build --preset default --target aria2_tests` passed. Focused OptionHandler, OptionParser, FeatureConfig, and RequestGroup tests passed. Help/manual/completion/source stale scans for removed options, handler framework, and public library residue passed. Completion shell syntax and `git diff --check` passed.
